body:
- Fix collapsed sidebar nav overflow (reduce padding, set overflow:hidden)
- Fix header-actions btn selector to only target shell header buttons
- Add progress-bar component styles
- Mobile: remove icon grayscale, add scale feedback on active
- Mobile: responsive table with sticky first column + scroll shadow hints
- Mobile: compact table cells (0.8rem, tighter padding)
- Clean up redundant theme overrides (bottom-bar-icon filter:none)
